steps.title: Find the key signal
steps.content: The phrase “Comics by other Black cartoonists followed” signals that the blank should introduce an example of those later cartoonists.

steps.title: Match the meaning to the choices
steps.content: “For instance,” introduces an example, which follows the idea that other Black cartoonists came after Turner. The other three either contrast, offer an alternative, or shift to an earlier time, none of which matches the continuation. That matches choice A — A is correct.
